debug_info.goal:
S : Finset ℕ
h₀ : S.card = 10
h₁ : S ⊆ Finset.Ico 10 100
⊢ ∃ S₁ S₂, S₁.Nonempty ∧ S₁ ⊆ S ∧ S₂.Nonempty ∧ S₂ ⊆ S ∧ Disjoint S₁ S₂ ∧ ∑ x ∈ S₁, x = ∑ x ∈ S₂, x

proof:
have hbounds : ∀ x ∈ S, 10 ≤ x ∧ x < 100 := fun x hx => Finset.mem_Ico.mp (h₁ hx)
  have hpos : ∀ x ∈ S, 0 < x := fun x hx => Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num) (hbounds x hx).1
  let P := S.powerset.filter (fun T => T.Nonempty)
  have hP_card : P.card = 1023 := by
    have h1 : S.powerset.card = 2^10 := by rw [Finset.card_powerset, h₀]
    have hfilter : P = S.powerset \ {∅} := by
      ext T
      constructor
      · intro hT
        simp only [Finset.mem_sdiff, Finset.mem_singleton]
        have hT' := Finset.mem_filter.mp hT
        exact ⟨hT'.1, Finset.Nonempty.ne_empty hT'.2⟩
      · intro hT
        simp only [Finset.mem_sdiff, Finset.mem_singleton] at hT
        exact Finset.mem_filter.mpr ⟨hT.1, Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr hT.2⟩
    rw [hfilter, Finset.card_sdiff (by simp)]; simp [h1]
  have hsum_in : ∀ T ∈ P, ∑ x ∈ T, x ∈ Finset.Icc 10 990 := by
    intro T hT
    have hT' := Finset.mem_filter.mp hT
    have hTsub : T ⊆ S := Finset.mem_powerset.mp hT'.1
    refine Finset.mem_Icc.mpr ⟨?_, ?_⟩
    · obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := hT'.2
      have h1 : t ≤ ∑ x ∈ T, x := Finset.single_le_sum (f := id) (fun _ _ => Nat.zero_le _) ht
      exact (hbounds t (hTsub ht)).1.trans h1
    · calc ∑ x ∈ T, x ≤ ∑ _ ∈ T, 99 := Finset.sum_le_sum fun x hx => Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp (hbounds x (hTsub hx)).2
        _ = 99 * T.card := by simp [Finset.sum_const, smul_eq_mul, mul_comm]
        _ ≤ 99 * 10 := Nat.mul_le_mul_left _ ((Finset.card_le_card hTsub).trans (le_of_eq h₀))
        _ = 990 := by norm_num
  have hcard_lt : (Finset.Icc 10 990).card < P.card := by simp [hP_card]
  obtain ⟨A, hA, B, hB, hne, heq⟩ := Finset.exists_ne_map_eq_of_card_lt_of_maps_to hcard_lt hsum_in
  have hA' := Finset.mem_filter.mp hA; have hB' := Finset.mem_filter.mp hB
  have hAsub : A ⊆ S := Finset.mem_powerset.mp hA'.1; have hBsub : B ⊆ S := Finset.mem_powerset.mp hB'.1
  have hAnB : (A \ B).Nonempty := by
    by_contra h; rw [Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty, Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset] at h
    apply hne; apply Finset.Subset.antisymm h; by_contra hneq
    obtain ⟨b, hbB, hbnA⟩ := Finset.not_subset.mp hneq
    have hlt : ∑ x ∈ A, x < ∑ x ∈ B, x :=
      Finset.sum_lt_sum_of_subset (f := id) h hbB hbnA (hpos b (hBsub hbB)) (fun _ _ _ => Nat.zero_le _)
    omega
  have hBnA : (B \ A).Nonempty := by
    by_contra h; rw [Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty, Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset] at h
    apply hne; symm; apply Finset.Subset.antisymm h; by_contra hneq
    obtain ⟨a, haA, hanB⟩ := Finset.not_subset.mp hneq
    have hlt : ∑ x ∈ B, x < ∑ x ∈ A, x :=
      Finset.sum_lt_sum_of_subset (f := id) h haA hanB (hpos a (hAsub haA)) (fun _ _ _ => Nat.zero_le _)
    omega
  have hdisj : Disjoint (A \ B) (B \ A) := disjoint_sdiff_sdiff
  have hsumeq : ∑ x ∈ A \ B, x = ∑ x ∈ B \ A, x := by
    have h1 : ∑ x ∈ A, x = ∑ x ∈ A \ B, x + ∑ x ∈ A ∩ B, x := by
      rw [← Finset.sum_union (Finset.disjoint_sdiff_inter A B), Finset.sdiff_union_inter]
    have h2 : ∑ x ∈ B, x = ∑ x ∈ B \ A, x + ∑ x ∈ B ∩ A, x := by
      rw [← Finset.sum_union (Finset.disjoint_sdiff_inter B A), Finset.sdiff_union_inter]
    rw [Finset.inter_comm] at h2; omega
  exact ⟨A \ B, B \ A, hAnB, Finset.sdiff_subset.trans hAsub, hBnA, Finset.sdiff_subset.trans hBsub, hdisj, hsumeq⟩
